creator: mrsam@courier-mta.com
text:
gcc 4.7 with -std=c++0x emits code which the current devel/gdb port, for gdb 7.3 can't quite deal with.

Need to update devel/gdb to 7.5

Fix: I have good results by updating the port to 7.5, FWIW, as attached.



Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Use gcc 4.7 to compile C++11x code that uses lambdas, try to debug with gdb73
